prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is P-302 Water heaters within 2.2 Mechanical - Piping & Plumbing. The relevant subcategory is 2.2.3 Plumbing - Supply. The observed field condition is: no drip pan where required. The work is being assessed at the in-service lifecycle state with source anchors IPC 504, IRC P2804.
title: T3 P-302 Fault diagnosis
